notes: Bash execution of validator/layout-checker was denied by sandbox; manual validation performed against every edge and coordinate pair. Validator rules enforced by walkthrough: (1) all coords in [0,1], (2) every edge endpoint declared, (3) ν(a) >= ν(b) for every edge (a,b). One violation found and fixed in-draft (Freshness Management vs Cold-Chain Handling swap). Near-duplicate coordinate collision between Freshness Management and Sustainability Audit detected and resolved by moving Sustainability Audit ε 0.50 -> 0.52. Stage-boundary straddle on Raw Material Sourcing resolved by moving ε 0.50 -> 0.48. Mermaid block skipped because bundled owm_to_mermaid converter could not be executed.
